title: TxBench-PP: Analyzing AI Agent Performance on Small-Molecule Preclinical Pharmacology
abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) agents promise to accelerate drug discovery by compressing interpretation and decision-making loops, but practical deployment requires trusted evaluation on realistic prog
abstract_zh: TxBench-PP简直是效率杀手的终极武器！想象一下，你正在忙着写那份冗长又复杂的周报，突然发现药理数据出奇地不给力。这时，**TxBench-PP**就像你的救星，瞬间搞定小分子药物的性能分析，让你专心致志打磨文字，再也不怕数据拖后腿了。这不比那些只会堆砌参数的工具强多了？赶紧试试吧！
